description.zh: 三层压缩策略：微压缩 → 自动压缩 → 做梦整合，实现无限会话
description.en: 3-layer compression strategy: micro-compression → auto-compression → dream integration, achieving unlimited sessions

content.zh: 帮我重构整个认证模块，包括所有相关文件
content.en: Help me refactor the entire auth module, including all related files

annotation.zh: 大型任务，会产生大量上下文
annotation.en: Large task, will generate lots of context

content.zh:
Token 使用: 80K / 200K (40%)
  对话历史: 35K
  工具结果: 15K
  System Prompt: 30K
content.en:
Token usage: 80K / 200K (40%)
  Conversation history: 35K
  Tool results: 15K
  System Prompt: 30K

content.zh:
Token 使用: 185K / 200K (92%) ⚠
  对话历史: 70K
  工具结果: 50K
  文件内容: 35K
content.en:
Token usage: 185K / 200K (92%) ⚠
  Conversation history: 70K
  Tool results: 50K
  File contents: 35K

annotation.zh: 多轮工具调用后，上下文接近上限
annotation.en: After multiple tool calls, context approaching limit

content.zh:
触发 L1: 微压缩
  工具结果 50K → 25K (截断中间内容)
  文件内容 35K → 20K (保留头尾)

  释放: 40K tokens
  当前: 145K / 200K (72%)
content.en:
Trigger L1: Micro-compression
  Tool results 50K → 25K (truncate middle)
  File contents 35K → 20K (keep head/tail)

  Released: 40K tokens
  Current: 145K / 200K (72%)

annotation.zh: 截断大型工具结果，保留关键信息
annotation.en: Truncate large tool results, keep key info

content.zh:
触发 L2: 自动压缩
  调用模型总结历史对话:
  "用户要求重构认证模块，已完成:
   1. 分析了依赖图
   2. 重写了 auth.ts
   待完成: 更新测试"

  70K 历史 → 25K 摘要
  当前: 80K / 200K (40%)
content.en:
Trigger L2: Auto-compression
  Call model to summarize history:
  "User requested auth module refactor, completed:
   1. Analyzed dependency graph
   2. Rewrote auth.ts
   TODO: Update tests"

  70K history → 25K summary
  Current: 80K / 200K (40%)

annotation.zh: 模型总结历史，大幅释放空间
annotation.en: Model summarizes history, significantly frees space

content.zh:
后台 L3: 做梦整合
  提取关键记忆:
  - "用户偏好 bcrypt 而非 MD5"
  - "项目使用 TypeScript strict"
  → 写入 SessionMemory
content.en:
Background L3: Dream integration
  Extract key memories:
  - "User prefers bcrypt over MD5"
  - "Project uses TypeScript strict"
  → Write to SessionMemory

annotation.zh: 异步提取关键信息，注入后续对话
annotation.en: Async extract key info, inject into subsequent conversations

content.zh: 认证模块重构进展顺利，接下来更新测试文件...
content.en: Auth module refactor progressing well, next updating test files...

annotation.zh: 压缩完成，对话继续，用户无感知
annotation.en: Compression done, conversation continues, user unaware
